com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXDiagramBaseInstance

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXDiagramBaseObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXDiagramInstance, IXDiagramObject, IXHarnessDiagramAxialDimension, IXHarnessDiagramBundle, IXHarnessDiagramFixture, IXHarnessDiagramNodeDimension, IXHarnessDiagramObject, IXLogicDiagramAssembly, IXLogicDiagramBasePin, IXLogicDiagramConductor, IXLogicDiagramDaisyChain, IXLogicDiagramHighway, IXLogicDiagramMultiCore, IXLogicDiagramObject, IXLogicDiagramPin, IXLogicDiagramPinList, IXLogicDiagramStackedPin

    public interface IXDiagramBaseInstance
extends IXDiagramBaseObject
    Base Interface to represent all diagram object instances.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXObject getConnectivity()
      For the current instance xobject, return the corresponding design xobject.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXDiagramBaseObject

        getDiagram, getZoneInfo

    • Method Detail

      • getConnectivity

        IXObject getConnectivity()

        For the current instance xobject, return the corresponding design xobject.

        The following lists the type of design xobjects that may be returned for each of the instance xobject (Depending on the type of the instance object)


        IXLogicDiagramPin :: IXAbstractPin (IXBackShellTermination, IXCavity, IXDevicePin, IXSplicePin, IXFunctionPort)
        IXLogicDiagramPinList :: IXAbstractPinList (IXBackShell, IXSplice, IXConnector, IXDeviceConnector, IXDevice, IXInterconnectDevice, IXGround, IXRingTerminal, IXFunction)
        IXLogicDiagramConductor :: IXAbstractConductor(IXInterconnect, IXNet, IXShield, IXWire, IXFunctionSignal)
        IXLogicDiagramMultiCore :: IXMultiCore
        IXHarnessDiagramBundle :: IXBundle
        IXHarnessDiagramFixture :: IXFixture
        IXHarnessDiagramObject :: IXSpotTape, IXBreakoutTape, IXInsulation, IXInsulationRun, IXMultiLocationComponent IXReferenceNode, IXStructureNode, IXClip, IXGrommet, IXOtherComponent, IXSplice, IXConnector, IXRingTerminal

        For object that does not have design xobjects, this xobject itself is returned.

        The following is the list such objects

        IXHarnessDiagramAxisDimenstion IXHarnessDiagramNodeDimenstion

        Example: 
                boolean function(IXDiagramObject diagramObject) {
                IXObject cObject = diagramObject.getConnectivity();
                if (cObject instance of IXConnector) {
                        retrun cObject.getProperty("P1") != null;
                 }
                return false;
         }
        Returns:
        IXObject
